sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 48

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 48:1
items.html:
(to the question) Chitzoniyut [exteriority]
Four kings [Melachim] came out in the world of Nekudim from the four levels of AVI, from the discernment of the Chazeh [chest] and above, which are Daat and CHaGaT. And four kings came out there from the four levels of YESHSUT, from the discernment of the Chazeh and below, which are the two lower thirds of Tifferet, and NHYM. Therefore the discernment of their correction in Atzilut is likewise divided: the correction of the kings from the Chazeh and above is called interiority [Pnimiyut], and the correction of the kings from the Chazeh and below is called exteriority [Chitzoniyut]. (p. 749, Item 22)
